title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
summary: The new default free model on claude.ai with 1M context window & adaptive thinking. Lowkey the best value play rn—same $3/$15 pricing but way more capable for coding & long docs.
takeaway: Free tier just got Opus-level reasoning at Sonnet pricing

title: Windsurf
summary: IDEs finally got smart enough to actually think through your code. Multi-file refactors, terminal access, & the whole flow just works. Beats Cursor for repo-wide context rn.
takeaway: The actual agentic IDE everyone's been waiting for

title: AssemblyAI Universal-Streaming
summary: New model hits lightning-fast speech recognition at $0.15/hour. Perfect for building actual voice experiences without lag. Tbh this is the missing piece for voice agent devs.
takeaway: ~300ms latency speech-to-text built for voice agents
